case_title: HOA NGUYEN VS. OVIDIO A. VASQUEZ

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, HOA AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, OVIDIO A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, HOA AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, OVIDIO A.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-08-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, OVIDIO A.
21ST CENTURY INSURANCE' LETTER RE PAYMENT TO HOA NGUYEN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2010 - CONTINUED TO JUL-30-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT TO APPEAR WITH A SPANISH INTERPRETER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALEX ANOLIK. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, HOA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, OVIDIO A. $519.36 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $519.36, THE COURT ATTRIBUTES COMPARITIVE FAULT AS 50% TO PLAINTIFF, AND 50% TO DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF MAY CASH THE CHECK TENDERED BY DEFENDANT'S INSURUER, TO BE CREDITED IN PARTIAL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, HOA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2010 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, OVIDIO A.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MURIEL FALAK PRESENT ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
